title: Aliyun BaiLian Launches HappyOyster 1.0: Open-World Model Supporting Real-Time Interaction Begins Gray Testing
excerpt: Today, Alibaba Cloud's Bailing officially launched the open-world model product HappyOyster 1.0 (Happy Oyster 1.0). This model supports real-time construction,
content_html:
Today, Alibaba Cloud's Bailing officially launched the open-world model product HappyOyster 1.0 (Happy Oyster 1.0). This model supports real-time construction, exploration, and interactive generation of AI digital worlds. It has already released SDKs for Android, iOS, and Web platforms and is now in a phased testing stage on Alibaba Cloud Bailing.

According to the introduction, HappyOyster 1.0 differs from traditional text-to-video models' unidirectional generation mode. Its core training objective is to learn the world state transition rules from "current state/action" to "next state/action." The model learns the evolution process of people, objects, and environments by analyzing massive natural videos. It can simulate the feedback relationships of actions and maintain long-term consistency of characters, scenes, and audio-visual content in the digital world.

The model offers two modes: "World Exploration (Adventure)" and "Real-Time Directing (Directing)." Under the World Exploration mode, users can input text or upload images to generate an interactive digital world. They can change the development of the scene through operations such as moving, jumping, attacking, and driving vehicles. It supports continuous real-time movement and camera control for up to one minute, and the generated content can be exported as the original video.

The Real-Time Directing mode allows users to pause and rewind at any point in the story and adjust the storyline direction with new prompts. This mode can generate real-time video of more than three minutes in 480p or 720p resolution and supports video export.

Alibaba Cloud stated that HappyOyster 1.0 is exploring the next generation of multimodal interactive content forms. It can be applied to open-world game prototypes, interactive short dramas, virtual companions, and immersive cultural tourism experiences. Developers can use the Open API to manage the world state, and use the client SDK to complete real-time communication, video rendering, and interaction control, quickly building playable AI world applications.

Industry experts believe that world models are becoming a new direction for the development of generative AI. Its core capabilities have shifted from "generating content" to "understanding and simulating the world." The release of HappyOyster 1.0 represents the beginning of domestic enterprises exploring new paths for real-time interactive AI environment construction.

sentences.en: It supports continuous real-time movement and camera control for up to one minute, and the generated content can be exported as the original video.

sentences.zh: 实时导演模式允许用户在故事中的任何点暂停和倒带，并根据新的提示调整故事情节方向。

sentences.en: This mode can generate real-time video of more than three minutes in 480p or 720p resolution and supports video export.
sentences.zh: 该模式可以生成3分钟以上480p或720p分辨率的实时视频，并支持视频导出。

sentences.en: It can be applied to open-world game prototypes, interactive short dramas, virtual companions, and immersive cultural tourism experiences.
sentences.zh: 可应用于开放世界游戏原型、互动短剧、虚拟同伴、沉浸式文旅体验等。

sentences.zh: 开发者可以使用Open API管理世界状态，并使用客户端SDK完成实时通信、视频渲染和交互控制，快速构建可玩的AI世界应用。

Its core capabilities have shifted from "generating content" to "understanding and simulating the world." The release of HappyOyster 1.0 represents the beginning of domestic enterprises exploring new paths for real-time interactive AI environment construction.

sentences.en: Industry experts believe that world models are becoming a new direction for the development of generative AI.
sentences.zh: 业内专家认为，世界模型正在成为生成式AI发展的新方向。

sentences.en: Its core capabilities have shifted from "generating content" to "understanding and simulating the world."
sentences.zh: 其核心能力已经从“生成内容”转向“理解和模拟世界”。

sentences.en: The release of HappyOyster 1.0 represents the beginning of domestic enterprises exploring new paths for real-time interactive AI environment construction.
sentences.zh: HappyOyster 1.0的发布，代表着国内企业探索实时交互AI环境建设新路径的开始。

content_html_zh:
今天，阿里云百灵正式推出开放世界模型产品HappyOyster 1.0（快乐牡蛎1.0）。 该模型支持AI数字世界的实时构建、探索和交互生成。 目前已经发布了Android、iOS、Web平台的SDK，目前在阿里云百灵处于阶段性测试阶段。

据介绍，HappyOyster 1.0不同于传统文本转视频模型的单向生成模式。 其核心训练目标是学习从“当前状态/动作”到“下一个状态/动作”的世界状态转换规则。 该模型通过分析海量自然视频来学习人、物、环境的演化过程。 它可以模拟动作的反馈关系，保持数字世界中人物、场景、视听内容的长期一致性。

该模式提供两种模式：“世界探索（Adventure）”和“实时导演（Directing）”。 在世界探索模式下，用户可以输入文本或上传图像来生成交互式数字世界。 他们可以通过移动、跳跃、攻击、驾驶车辆等操作来改变场景的发展。 它支持长达一分钟的连续实时移动和摄像机控制，生成的内容可以导出为原始视频。

实时导演模式允许用户在故事中的任何点暂停和倒带，并根据新的提示调整故事情节方向。 该模式可以生成3分钟以上480p或720p分辨率的实时视频，并支持视频导出。

阿里云表示，HappyOyster 1.0正在探索下一代多模态交互内容形式。 可应用于开放世界游戏原型、互动短剧、虚拟同伴、沉浸式文旅体验等。 开发者可以使用Open API管理世界状态，并使用客户端SDK完成实时通信、视频渲染和交互控制，快速构建可玩的AI世界应用。

业内专家认为，世界模型正在成为生成式AI发展的新方向。 其核心能力已经从“生成内容”转向“理解和模拟世界”。 HappyOyster 1.0的发布，代表着国内企业探索实时交互AI环境建设新路径的开始。
